task_description: Create the <QuantLive /> conversational UI component suite in packages/shared-ui with pulsing orb, captions, action chip, privacy indicator, and controls. Phase 41 FEAT-004.

verification.summary: TypeScript typecheck passes. All 155 tests pass (99 existing + 56 new QuantLive tests across 6 test files). Review feedback addressed: added controlled props for external state injection, portal-based privacy indicator, camera emoji distinction, position fallback, and full test coverage for all subcomponents.
